audit_items.proof_trace: Sync path validates only inclusion proof (L190) before quarantine insertion (L437), bypassing length equality check in verify_data_column_sidecar. When block_processor calls verify_data_column_sidecar_kzg_proofs directly (L687), mismatched arrays reach verifyCellKzgProofBatch.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker sends DataColumnSidecar via beaconDataColumnsByRoot with column.len ≠ kzg_commitments.len. Sync validates inclusion proof only, adds to quarantine. Block processor calls KZG batch verification with mismatched array lengths (cellIndices uses column.len, but commitments/proofs have different lengths), causing undefined behavior in C library.
